creator: ji@tla.org
text:
/usr/src/usr.sbin/tcpdump/tcpdump/ is empty, and there is a
makefile there which does nothing.  What is the purpose of this?

Fix: 

Either remove /usr/src/usr.sbin/tcpdump or include a README pointing
to the right place (unless there is something I'm missing).
How-To-Repeat: 
	ls -l /usr/src/usr.sbin/tcpdump/tcpdump/
